overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district at dusk. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, and continues along the street as futuristic vehicles pass by. The environment features towering glass skyscrapers with cyan and pink neon accents, digital billboards, and elevated highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past palm trees and cyan neon pillar lights, approaching a large intersection

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a red spider-like graphic with cyrillic text
tall skyscraper with extensive glass facade and glowing cyan neon accent lines
sleek vertical street lamp emitting bright cyan light
large horizontal digital screen displaying yellow silhouetted figures against a bright background
massive concrete and steel elevated highway or monorail tracks spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and illuminated by cyan neon pillar lights. Towering glass buildings with glowing trim and large digital billboards dominate the background as the character approaches a wide intersection beneath an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with diagonal yellow crosswalk stripes

events.description: character stops at crosswalk waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass through the intersection
character begins crossing the street along the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then walking across the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black truck driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing marked with bold diagonal yellow stripes and red text markings
vertical traffic signal showing red light for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide intersection with bold diagonal yellow crosswalk stripes and waits for futuristic vehicles to pass. As the traffic clears, the character crosses the multi-lane road alongside other pedestrians, moving from the enclosed sidewalk into the open intersection with towering buildings visible in all directions.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk at a steady pace beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: modern building with dark exterior walls and illuminated ground-floor windows
curved on-ramp structure of the elevated highway system with support columns

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk beneath the massive elevated highway structure. The environment features dark modern building facades with scattered neon accents and palm trees lining the path as futuristic vehicles continue to drive by on the adjacent multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character navigates a neon-lit futuristic district, moving from a sheltered sidewalk across a bustling intersection and back into the shadow of urban infrastructure. It begins with the character walking along a wide concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and cyan neon pillars, flanked by towering glass buildings and digital billboards. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the scene opens up to reveal bold yellow crosswalk stripes and a flow of futuristic vehicles before the camera follows them across the multi-lane road alongside other pedestrians. The perspective then shifts back toward the edge of the street, moving beneath the massive weight of an elevated highway structure. Finally, the character continues along the opposite sidewalk past dark modern facades and scattered neon accents as traffic continues to stream by on the adjacent road.
